reason: Geopolitical tensions have swiftly introduced significant downside volatility, interrupting the recent Bitcoin rally. While long-term fundamentals remain robust with increasing institutional adoption and clarity (Custodia, Circle), the immediate market sentiment is risk-off. Investors should monitor for stabilization and clear support before making new directional bets, as short-term speculative activity (Trump gala) adds to the volatility.
